name: Deterministic Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o with temperature=0, seed pinning, and structured JSON output

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Agent runtime with structured output validation and retry orchestration

services.name: Content Safety
services.purpose: Input/output guardrails — prompt injection detection, content filtering

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, connection strings, agent configuration secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Agent execution tracing, determinism scoring, output consistency tracking

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized logging — structured output validation results, guardrail triggers

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini with temperature=0 for simple structured tasks — 90% cheaper than GPT-4o
Cache deterministic outputs for identical inputs — same seed + temp=0 = same result
Use Container Apps Consumption plan for dev — scale-to-zero eliminates idle costs
Batch validation requests to Content Safety API to reduce per-transaction costs
Set max_tokens conservatively for structured JSON output — prevents token waste
Use response_format: json_object to avoid retry costs from malformed outputs
